response.justification: Over 15 years of fullstack engineering across Node.js, TypeScript, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Kubernetes maps well to the core stack, and current-role work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling directly satisfies the AI agent requirement. The main gap is the absence of Nest.js anywhere on the resume, with secondary gaps in Kotlin, Python, and explicit use of Jest/Vitest/Playwright — all learnable given the demonstrated depth.
strengths: Deep Node.js and TypeScript experience across multiple production roles at scale
Explicit AI agent and MCP tooling experience at current position — rare and directly required
Consistent cloud and containerization exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) alongside NoSQL and SQL databases
concerns: Nest.js is absent from the resume despite being the primary backend framework
Python and Kotlin not listed in skills, both called out as required multi-language proficiencies
React and modern JS testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not prominent — frontend work has been primarily Ember.js
